Metadata.title: Gemini Turkiye | Premium Turkey Travel Experiences
Metadata.description: Curated luxury journeys through the crossroads of civilizations. Discover Cappadocia, Istanbul, Pamukkale and beyond with Gemini Turkiye.

Hero.subtitle: Curated luxury journeys through the crossroads of civilizations

Destinations.sectionSubtitle: From ancient ruins to Mediterranean shores, discover Turkey's most breathtaking locations

cappadocia.name: Cappadocia
cappadocia.description: Fairy chimneys and hot air balloon adventures at sunrise over a lunar landscape

istanbul.name: Istanbul
istanbul.description: Where continents collide — Byzantine grandeur meets Ottoman magnificence

pamukkale.name: Pamukkale
pamukkale.description: Cotton castle terraces of shimmering white travertines and ancient thermal pools

ephesus.name: Ephesus
ephesus.description: Walk through millennia of history in one of the best-preserved ancient cities

antalya.name: Antalya
antalya.description: Turquoise coastline meets ancient Lycian ruins on the Mediterranean riviera

gobeklitepe.name: Göbeklitepe
gobeklitepe.description: The world's oldest temple complex — rewriting the story of human civilization

bodrum.name: Bodrum
bodrum.description: Aegean elegance with whitewashed villages, azure bays and legendary nightlife

Experiences.sectionSubtitle: Timeless memories crafted with passion and expertise

balloon.name: Hot Air Balloon Rides
balloon.description: Soar above the fairy chimneys of Cappadocia at sunrise, witnessing a landscape that defies imagination from the sky.

gulet.name: Gulet Cruises
gulet.description: Sail the turquoise waters of the Aegean and Mediterranean aboard a traditional Turkish wooden gulet.

cultural.name: Cultural Journeys
cultural.description: Witness the mesmerizing Whirling Dervishes ceremony and explore living traditions spanning centuries.

food.name: Culinary Adventures
food.description: From Istanbul's spice bazaar to Gaziantep's kitchens, taste the rich tapestry of Turkish cuisine.

Testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Hear from travelers who experienced the magic of Turkey with us

items.quote: An absolutely transformative experience. The balloon ride over Cappadocia at dawn was the most magical moment of my life.
items.name: Sarah Mitchell

items.quote: Gemini Turkiye crafted a journey that exceeded every expectation. The attention to detail was impeccable.

items.quote: From the gulet cruise to the Whirling Dervishes, every moment was curated to perfection. Truly unforgettable.
items.name: Marie Dubois

items.quote: The culinary tour through Istanbul was a revelation. We discovered flavors and traditions we never knew existed.

CTA.title: Plan Your Dream Journey
CTA.subtitle: Let us craft an unforgettable Turkish experience tailored just for you

About.storyP1: Gemini Turkiye was born from a deep love for Turkey's rich tapestry of cultures, landscapes, and traditions. Founded in 2010, we set out to share the authentic beauty of this extraordinary country with discerning travelers from around the world.
About.storyP2: Our team of expert travel designers combines intimate local knowledge with world-class hospitality to create journeys that transcend ordinary tourism. Every itinerary is meticulously crafted to reveal Turkey's hidden gems alongside its iconic landmarks.
About.storyP3: From the fairy chimneys of Cappadocia to the azure waters of the Aegean, from the bustling bazaars of Istanbul to the ancient ruins of Ephesus — we ensure every moment of your Turkish journey is nothing short of extraordinary.

luxury.title: Uncompromising Luxury
luxury.description: Every detail is curated to deliver an experience of the highest caliber

authenticity.title: Cultural Authenticity
authenticity.description: We connect you with Turkey's living heritage through genuine local experiences

excellence.title: Service Excellence
excellence.description: Our dedicated team ensures seamless journeys from first inquiry to final farewell
